nodes.name: 🕗 Daily Trigger 8AM
nodes.notes: Fires every day at 8AM. Change cron expression to adjust schedule.

nodes.name: 🧠 Agent 0: Prompt Engineer
nodes.notes: Master orchestrator agent. Generates all downstream agent prompts dynamically.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse Prompt Package
nodes.notes: Parses and validates the prompt package. Falls back to defaults on error.

nodes.name: 🔍 Agent 1: Research & Topic
nodes.notes: Finds best monetizable topic using prompt from Prompt Engineer.

nodes.name: ✍️ Agent 2: Content Writer
nodes.notes: Writes full 2800+ word article using Prompt Engineer's detailed brief.

nodes.name: 🫂 Agent 3: Humanizer
nodes.notes: Transforms AI-sounding content into natural human expert writing.

nodes.name: 🎯 Agent 4: SEO & Monetization
nodes.notes: Generates full SEO package including schema markup, meta, and all affiliate CTAs.

nodes.name: 🔧 Assemble Final Article
nodes.notes: Merges humanized content + SEO data + affiliate CTAs + ad zones into WordPress-ready payload.

nodes.name: ✅ QC Approved?
nodes.notes: Routes to image finder if approved, or logs rejection if not.

nodes.name: 📸 Search Pexels
nodes.notes: Free stock images from Pexels. Get API key at pexels.com/api

nodes.name: 📸 Search Pixabay (Fallback)
nodes.notes: Fallback to Pixabay if Pexels returns no results. Free API at pixabay.com/api/docs/

nodes.name: 🔀 Select Best Image
nodes.notes: Picks best image from Pexels or Pixabay. Flags for AI generation if none found.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: =Generate a description for a photorealistic blog featured image about: {{ $('Build Image Queries').item.json.primary_query }}. Style: professional, bright, editorial, suitable for a how-to blog. Colors: vibrant but clean. No text in image.

nodes.name: 🎨 Generate Image (Ollama/SD)
nodes.notes: Uses Ollama BakLLaVA or connect to local Stable Diffusion WebUI API at localhost:7860/sdapi/v1/txt2img

nodes.name: 📝 Publish to WordPress
nodes.notes: Publishes to WordPress via REST API. Requires Application Password credential.

nodes.name: 📱 Agent 6: Social Media + Reels
nodes.notes: Creates platform-specific viral content for FB, IG, TikTok, Pinterest, YT Shorts + universal reel script.

nodes.name: 🔀 Platform Router
nodes.notes: Routes each social post to its platform node.

nodes.name: 📸 Post to Instagram
nodes.notes: Posts via Instagram Graph API. Requires Facebook Business account + IG Professional account.

nodes.name: 🎵 Schedule TikTok
nodes.notes: TikTok Content Posting API v2. Saves script to Google Sheets for manual video creation.

nodes.name: 🎬 Queue YT Short Script
nodes.notes: YT Shorts require video upload via YouTube Data API. Scripts queued here for creation.

nodes.name: 💬 Fetch Pending Comments
nodes.notes: Fetches unapproved comments from WordPress. Run this separately on a 2-hour schedule.

nodes.name: 🧞 Agent 7: Comment Moderator
nodes.notes: Reviews, classifies, and generates replies for all pending comments.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Master content log. Track all posts, performance, and monetization.
